_reason: Kinch is Mulligan's nickname for Stephen Dedalus — an inline gloss explaining the nickname is more useful to readers than a Wikipedia link
Mulligan calls Stephen 'Chrysostomos' (golden-mouthed), a reference to the Church Father
Introibo ad altare Dei — Latin liturgical phrase; gloss is correct since the word alone is not a stable article title
Kingstown is the former name of Dún Laoghaire, the Dublin port town
Mulligan calls Stephen 'poor dogsbody' and references The Tempest
Thalatta! Thalatta! — the famous sea-cry from Xenophon's Anabasis; Wikipedia only has a moth genus article, gloss is the correct annotation
Hiberno-English slang — a gloss explaining the dialect term is useful to readers
